name: Burning
description: Takes 1 damage at the start of each turn for 2 turns.

name: Retort
description: When this character is attacked, deal 2 damage back to the attacker.

name: Cursed
description: This character cannot benefit from healing.

name: Edible
description: This character can be consumed by Shish-Ke-Bob's ability.

name: Accelerated
description: This character may use one additional action this turn.

name: Tapped
description: This character has acted this turn and cannot act again until untapped.
